Package com.oop.referendumserver.db.model

Class SimpleReferendum

java.lang.Object
com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.Referendum
com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.SimpleReferendum
Direct Known Subclasses:
QuotaReferendum
@Entity public class SimpleReferendum extends Referendum
Represents a simple referendum in the referendum system.
